message:
audit(378-379): backfill 45 historic entries + 5 new audits, fix JSONL escapes

Backfilled audit_index.jsonl with 45 entries for files previously audited
in batches 311-375 (Mar 12-14 sessions). Fixed 3 invalid JSON escape
sequences. Added 5 new fresh-eyes audits (batch 379): grpc/status.rs,
observability/metrics.rs, observability/collector.rs, observability/level.rs,
raptorq/builder.rs — all SOUND.

Total indexed: ~490 unique files out of 587.
